message:
test(asserts): [7k7pl batch 5] pin wizard state + secret-scan finding shape

Upgrade 5 presence-only `.is_some()` / `!is_empty()` assertions in
wizard-state and secret-scan tests to pin exact content + severity +
structural shape.

- pages_wizard.rs (test_wizard_state_with_custom_config): replace
  `state.password.is_some()` with
  `assert_eq!(state.password.as_deref(), Some("test-password-123"))`
  to catch a regression that swapped in a default password.
- pages_wizard.rs (test_wizard_state_final_site_dir_tracking): merge
  `.is_some()` + `.ends_with("site")` into a single
  `assert_eq!(..., Some(&expected))` that pins the full path.
- secret_scan.rs (detects_secret_in_title): unwrap the found finding
  and assert severity ∈ {Critical, High} + non-empty
  match_redacted, catching a down-grade or redaction-skip regression.
- secret_scan.rs (detects_secret_in_metadata_json): same pattern.
- secret_scan.rs (finding_includes_agent_and_source_path): unwrap
  source_path + conversation_id; assert non-empty string + positive
  i64, catching a None-wrapped-empty or bad-row-id regression.

Verified green: 76 secret_scan + 36 pages_wizard tests pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
